from src.topstep_client import TopstepClient
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
with TopstepClient\(\) as c:
    end = datetime.now\(timezone.utc\)
    start = end - timedelta\(hours=4\)
    bars = c.get_bars\('CON.F.US.MES.H26', start, end, unit=TopstepClient.MINUTE, unit_number=1, limit=500\)
    print\(f'now:       {end.isoformat\(\)}'\)
    print\(f'last bar:  {bars[-1][\\"t\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'first bar: {bars[0][\\"t\\"]}'\)
    delta = end - datetime.fromisoformat\(bars[-1]['t']\)
    print\(f'lag:       {delta}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/opt/anaconda3/envs/topstep-project/bin/python -c "
import math, sys, numpy as np, pandas as pd
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)

df = pd.read_csv\('mes_hist_1min.csv', parse_dates=['ts']\)
if not df['ts'].dt.tz:
    df['ts'] = df['ts'].dt.tz_localize\('UTC'\)
hour = df['ts'].dt.hour
df = df[~\(\(hour >= 21\) & \(hour < 22\)\)].copy\(\)
df = df.sort_values\('ts'\).reset_index\(drop=True\)
df['gap'] = df['ts'].diff\(\) > pd.Timedelta\(minutes=2\)

records, i = [], 0
while i + 5 <= len\(df\):
    chunk = df.iloc[i:i+5]
    if chunk['gap'].iloc[1:].values.any\(\):
        i += int\(chunk['gap'].iloc[1:].values.argmax\(\)\) + 1; continue
    records.append\({'ts': chunk['ts'].iloc[0], 'close': chunk['close'].iloc[-1],
                    'volume': chunk['volume'].sum\(\)}\)
    i += 5
bars = pd.DataFrame\(records\)
bars['gap'] = bars['ts'].diff\(\) != pd.Timedelta\(minutes=5\)
bars.iloc[0, bars.columns.get_loc\('gap'\)] = True

closes  = bars['close'].values
volumes = bars['volume'].values
gaps    = bars['gap'].values
ts_pd   = pd.DatetimeIndex\(bars['ts'].values, tz='UTC'\)
n       = len\(bars\)

big = []
for i in range\(100, n-3\):
    if gaps[i-100+1:i+4].any\(\): continue
    trail = np.log\(closes[i-100+1:i+1] / closes[i-100:i]\)
    sigma = float\(np.std\(trail, ddof=1\)\)
    if sigma == 0: continue
    mean_vol = volumes[i-100:i].mean\(\)
    vol_ratio = volumes[i] / mean_vol if mean_vol > 0 else 0
    bar_ret = math.log\(closes[i] / closes[i-1]\)
    scaled = abs\(bar_ret / sigma\)
    if scaled >= 3 and vol_ratio >= 1.5:
        big.append\(\(scaled, ts_pd[i], closes[i]\)\)

big.sort\(reverse=True\)
print\(f'Top 20 largest scaled returns \(trail=100\):'\)
print\(f'  {\\"scaled\\":>8}  {\\"date/time \(UTC\)\\":<22}  price'\)
for s, ts, p in big[:20]:
    print\(f'  {s:>8.2f}σ  {str\(ts\)[:19]:<22}  {p:,.2f}'\)

scaleds = np.array\([x[0] for x in big]\)
print\(f'\\ndistribution:'\)
for p in [95, 99, 99.5, 100]:
    print\(f'  p{p}: {np.percentile\(scaleds, p\):.2f}σ'\)
print\(f'  >5σ: {\(scaleds > 5\).sum\(\)}'\)
print\(f'  >7σ: {\(scaleds > 7\).sum\(\)}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(/opt/anaconda3/envs/topstep-project/bin/python -c "
import math, sys, numpy as np, pandas as pd
from scipy import stats
sys.path.insert\(0, 'src'\)

TRAILING_BARS = 20; TF = 5; MAX_BARS_HOLD = 3
MIN_SCALED = 3.0; MIN_VOL_RATIO = 1.5
PRAC_S, PRAC_T = 2.0, 3.0
MOM_W = 8   # 40 min
CSR_THR = 1.5
STOPS = [0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0]; TARGETS = [0.5,1.0,1.5,2.0,2.5,3.0]

df = pd.read_csv\('mes_hist_1min.csv', parse_dates=['ts']\)
if not df['ts'].dt.tz:
    df['ts'] = df['ts'].dt.tz_localize\('UTC'\)
hour = df['ts'].dt.hour
df = df[~\(\(hour >= 21\) & \(hour < 22\)\)].copy\(\)
df = df.sort_values\('ts'\).reset_index\(drop=True\)
df['gap'] = df['ts'].diff\(\) > pd.Timedelta\(minutes=2\)

records, i = [], 0
while i + TF <= len\(df\):
    chunk = df.iloc[i:i+TF]
    if chunk['gap'].iloc[1:].values.any\(\):
        i += int\(chunk['gap'].iloc[1:].values.argmax\(\)\) + 1; continue
    records.append\({'ts': chunk['ts'].iloc[0], 'open': chunk['open'].iloc[0],
                    'high': chunk['high'].max\(\), 'low': chunk['low'].min\(\),
                    'close': chunk['close'].iloc[-1], 'volume': chunk['volume'].sum\(\)}\)
    i += TF
bars = pd.DataFrame\(records\)
bars['gap'] = bars['ts'].diff\(\) != pd.Timedelta\(minutes=TF\)
bars.iloc[0, bars.columns.get_loc\('gap'\)] = True

closes = bars['close'].values; highs = bars['high'].values
lows = bars['low'].values; volumes = bars['volume'].values
gaps = bars['gap'].values
ts_pd = pd.DatetimeIndex\(bars['ts'].values, tz='UTC'\)
n = len\(bars\)

rows = []
for i in range\(max\(TRAILING_BARS, MOM_W\), n - MAX_BARS_HOLD\):
    if gaps[i-TRAILING_BARS+1:i+MAX_BARS_HOLD+1].any\(\): continue
    trail = np.log\(closes[i-TRAILING_BARS+1:i+1] / closes[i-TRAILING_BARS:i]\)
    sigma = float\(np.std\(trail, ddof=1\)\)
    if sigma == 0: continue
    mean_vol = volumes[i-TRAILING_BARS:i].mean\(\)
    vol_ratio = volumes[i] / mean_vol if mean_vol > 0 else 0
    bar_ret = math.log\(closes[i] / closes[i-1]\)
    scaled = bar_ret / sigma
    if abs\(scaled\) < MIN_SCALED or vol_ratio < MIN_VOL_RATIO: continue
    direction = 1 if scaled > 0 else -1
    if gaps[i-MOM_W:i].any\(\): csr = float\('nan'\)
    else:
        wr = np.log\(closes[i-MOM_W+1:i] / closes[i-MOM_W:i-1]\)
        csr = float\(wr.sum\(\)\) / sigma * direction
    entry = closes[i]
    tgt_p = {t: entry*math.exp\(direction*t*sigma\) for t in TARGETS}
    stp_p = {s: entry*math.exp\(-direction*s*sigma\) for s in STOPS}
    ht = {t: None for t in TARGETS}; hs = {s: None for s in STOPS}
    for j in range\(i+1, i+MAX_BARS_HOLD+1\):
        h,l = highs[j], lows[j]
        for t in TARGETS:
            if ht[t] is None and \(\(direction==1 and h>=tgt_p[t]\) or \(direction==-1 and l<=tgt_p[t]\)\): ht[t]=j-i
        for s in STOPS:
            if hs[s] is None and \(\(direction==1 and l<=stp_p[s]\) or \(direction==-1 and h>=stp_p[s]\)\): hs[s]=j-i
    ter = math.log\(closes[i+MAX_BARS_HOLD]/entry\)*direction/sigma
    rows.append\({'year': ts_pd[i].year, 'csr': csr, 'ter': ter,
                 **{f'ht_{t}': ht[t] for t in TARGETS}, **{f'hs_{s}': hs[s] for s in STOPS}}\)

res = pd.DataFrame\(rows\)

def ev\(sub\):
    if len\(sub\) < 5: return float\('nan'\), len\(sub\)
    ht = sub[f'ht_{PRAC_T}'].notna\(\).values
    hs = sub[f'hs_{PRAC_S}'].notna\(\).values
    htf = ht & ~\(hs & \(sub[f'hs_{PRAC_S}'].fillna\(999\) <= sub[f'ht_{PRAC_T}'].fillna\(999\)\).values\)
    hsf = hs & ~htf; nei = ~htf & ~hsf
    ev_n = sub['ter'].values[nei].mean\(\) if nei.any\(\) else 0.0
    return htf.mean\(\)*PRAC_T - hsf.mean\(\)*PRAC_S + nei.mean\(\)*ev_n, len\(sub\)

print\(f'Year-by-year: ALL triggers vs CSR>{CSR_THR} \({MOM_W*TF}-min\) vs CSR<-{CSR_THR} \(against\)'\)
print\(f'{\\"Year\\":<6} {\\"ALL n\\":>7} {\\"ALL EV\\":>9}   {\\"WITH n\\":>7} {\\"WITH EV\\":>9}   {\\"AGAINST n\\":>9} {\\"AGAINST EV\\":>11}'\)
print\('-'*70\)
for yr in sorted\(res['year'].unique\(\)\):
    yr_all   = res[res['year']==yr]
    yr_with  = yr_all[yr_all['csr'] > CSR_THR]
    yr_agnst = yr_all[yr_all['csr'] < -CSR_THR]
    ea, na = ev\(yr_all\); ew, nw = ev\(yr_with\); eg, ng = ev\(yr_agnst\)
    fa = '◄' if not math.isnan\(ea\) and ea>0 else ' '
    fw = '◄' if not math.isnan\(ew\) and ew>0 else ' '
    fg = '◄' if not math.isnan\(eg\) and eg>0 else ' '
    ea_s = f'{ea:>+.4f}σ{fa}' if not math.isnan\(ea\) else '    —    '
    ew_s = f'{ew:>+.4f}σ{fw}' if not math.isnan\(ew\) and nw>=20 else f'[n={nw}]'
    eg_s = f'{eg:>+.4f}σ{fg}' if not math.isnan\(eg\) and ng>=20 else f'[n={ng}]'
    print\(f'{yr:<6} {na:>7,} {ea_s:>10}   {nw:>7,} {ew_s:>10}   {ng:>9,} {eg_s:>12}'\)

print\(\)
print\('Overall:'\)
ea, na = ev\(res\)
ew, nw = ev\(res[res['csr'] > CSR_THR]\)
eg, ng = ev\(res[res['csr'] < -CSR_THR]\)
print\(f'{\\"\\":6} {na:>7,} {ea:>+.4f}σ   {nw:>7,} {ew:>+.4f}σ   {ng:>9,} {eg:>+.4f}σ'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(wait && conda run -n topstep-project python src/backtest_tf_sweep.py --sym MES --option A 2>&1)
